cardiomegaly.name: Cardiomegaly
cardiomegaly.m4_action: Assess for CHF, valvular disease; order Echo, BNP

pneumothorax.name: Possible Pneumothorax
pneumothorax.description: Peripheral lucency with absent lung markings
pneumothorax.m4_action: Check tracheal deviation, breath sounds; if tension → needle decompression 2nd ICS MCL; order stat CXR/CT

pleural_effusion.name: Pleural Effusion
pleural_effusion.description: Basal opacification with meniscus / blunted costophrenic angle
pleural_effusion.m4_action: Grade size; consider thoracentesis if large/symptomatic; work up exudate vs transudate (Light's criteria)

pulmonary_edema.name: Pulmonary Edema
pulmonary_edema.description: Bilateral diffuse haziness, perihilar bat-wing pattern
pulmonary_edema.m4_action: Assess volume status, BNP, Echo; start diuresis (furosemide); monitor O₂ sat

consolidation.name: Consolidation / Pneumonia
consolidation.description: Focal airspace opacity with or without air bronchograms
consolidation.m4_action: Determine CAP vs HAP; start empiric antibiotics per guidelines; follow up film in 6 wks

atelectasis.name: Atelectasis
atelectasis.description: Linear or lobar opacity with volume loss / tracheal shift
atelectasis.m4_action: Encourage deep breathing/incentive spirometry; rule out obstructing lesion if lobar; chest PT

emphysema.name: Emphysema / Hyperinflation
emphysema.description: Flat diaphragm, barrel chest, increased AP diameter
emphysema.m4_action: Confirm COPD history; PFTs; bronchodilators; smoking cessation counseling

focal_opacity.name: Focal Opacity / Nodule
focal_opacity.description: Focal high-density region — nodule, mass, or infiltrate
focal_opacity.m4_action: Apply Fleischner Society guidelines for nodule follow-up; CT chest; consider PET if >8mm
